signals.headline: Ethereum (ETH) Hits $6K Milestone Amid Pectra Upgrade Final Testing and Record ETF Inflows | YES | HIGH confidence**[3]
signals.raw:
Ethereum (ETH) Hits $6K Milestone Amid Pectra Upgrade Final Testing and Record ETF Inflows | YES | HIGH confidence**[3]

The Pectra (Prague-Electra) Upgrade has entered its **final testing phase** as of April 18, 2026, boosting network efficiency, wallet abstraction, and validator performance while driving explosive Layer 2 growth (e.g., Base, Arbitrum TVL milestones).[3] Spot Ethereum ETFs report

signals.headline: Iran's foreign minister announced "passage for all commercial vessels through Strait of Hormuz is declared completely op
signals.raw: Iran's foreign minister announced "passage for all commercial vessels through Strait of Hormuz is declared completely open for the remaining period of ceasefire" in Lebanon, causing stock markets to rally and oil prices to plummet approximately 10 percent.[3]

signals.headline: Despite Trump's peace rhetoric, the Pentagon is surging thousands of additional troops to the Middle East, including dep
signals.raw: Despite Trump's peace rhetoric, the Pentagon is surging thousands of additional troops to the Middle East, including deploying the USS George H.W. Bush aircraft carrier battle group.[3]

signals.headline: Israel Agrees to 10-Day Ceasefire in Lebanon After U
signals.raw:
Israel Agrees to 10-Day Ceasefire in Lebanon After U.S.-Brokered Talks | YES | HIGH confidence**

Israel has agreed to a 10-day ceasefire in Lebanon following U.S.-brokered negotiations, ending seven weeks of attacks that killed nearly 2,200 people.[3] The ceasefire took effect Thursday evening, April 17.[3]

Iran Deal "Very Close" but No Agreement Reached | NO | HIGH confidence**
